prompt: Create a highly detailed vertical mixed-media textile collage portrait of a delicate elf maiden made from real-looking lace, dried flowers, leaves, ribbons, and layered fabric scraps. The composition has exactly 1 central elf figure shown full body in a soft side-facing pose, with 2 long pointed ears, very long wavy ash-blonde hair, and a simple matte beige rectangular mask covering the face as an intentional blank placeholder. Dress the figure in exactly 5 visible costume components: a tattered off-white lace gown, a layered lace shawl, a large lace-and-flower headpiece, trailing gauze ribbons, and a small wildflower bouquet held at the chest. Surround the figure with a dense cream-and-sage botanical frame containing exactly 4 prominent anchor decorations: 1 large olive satin bow in the upper left, 1 diagonal white lace ribbon sweeping across the upper right, 1 large cream rose in the lower right, and 1 vertical cluster of dried beige grasses along the left side. Use ivory, antique cream, beige, sage green, muted olive, pale gold with no bright colors. Emphasize tactile material realism: crocheted lace holes, frayed fabric edges, translucent gauze, pressed leaves, tiny white blossoms, dried stems, embroidered mesh, paper-like petals, and subtle shadows between layers. The background is an ornate handmade wall of overlapping lace scraps, botanical cuttings, and vintage fabric, filling the entire frame with no empty space. Lighting is soft diffuse natural light, warm vintage tone, shallow dimensional relief, romantic fairycore aesthetic, extremely intricate texture, high resolution, no text, no watermark.
